arts.ttl: Xavi faces awkward reunion with Man Utd star if he replaces Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Xavi is among the managers being tracked by Manchester United with contact reportedly made - but the ex-Barcelona boss has some bad blood with Red Devils star Casemiro

arts.ttl: West Ham handed extra blow ahead of Manchester United clash as statement released
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as Erik ten Hag's side take on the Hammers in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Xavi holds talks over Man Utd job - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Former Barcelona boss Xavi has held discussions with Manchester United, Sevilla are interested in taking Tottenham defender Archie Gray on loan, plus more.

arts.ttl: Papers: Barca legend Xavi in frame if Man Utd axe Ten Hag
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Report: Man Utd target no closer to signing new contract
arts.sum: Angel Gomes could soon have a huge decision to make amid continued links with former club Manchester United and the fast-approaching end of his contract with Lille. United lost Gomes on a free transfer but recapturing him in similar fashion, having seen him grow and flourish as a first-team player in the intervening years, feels a bit like fate.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's £1m wonderkid Sekou Kone handed unlikely chance by Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United signed Sekou Kone during the summer transfer window and the 18-year-old Mali youth international was involved in first team training on Tuesday at Carrington

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank addresses Manchester United links as Erik ten Hag remains under pressure
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly drawn up a four-man shortlist to replace Erik ten Hag

RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba has reportedly reached an agreement to sign a one-year contract extension at the club. Lukeba is wanted by Real Madrid, Manchester United and Liverpool, while Chelsea have also been linked with the 21-year-old in recent months as they continue scouting the best young talents in world football.

arts.ttl: Manchester United 'contact' potential Erik ten Hag replacement as club ‘plans’ outlined
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news and rumours as speculation around the future of Erik ten Hag continues to swirl despite the side returning to winning ways at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Man Utd explain second Sir Alex Ferguson absence after brutal Sir Jim Ratcliffe axe
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson missed Manchester United's win over Brentford at the weekend and is now expected to be absent from the Europa League clash against Fenerbahce on Thursday
